query: SELECT id, establishmentId, isEnabled, IFNULL(phoneNumberId, 'NULL') as phoneNumId, IFNULL(webhookVerifyToken, 'NULL') as verifyToken, IFNULL(LEFT(accessToken, 30), 'NULL') as tokenPrefix, IFNULL(businessAccountId, 'NULL') as baId, autoReplyEnabled FROM whatsapp_settings;
